C

compareTo(Dog) - Method in class agilitycompetition.Competitor
compareTo (abstract method of the Comparable Interface) is implemented to impose a natural ordering on a group of objects.
compareTo(Date) - Method in class agilitycompetition.Date
compareTo (abstract method of the Comparable Interface) is
implemented to impose a natural ordering on a group of objects.
compareTo is used by the Collections.sort routine to allow us to sort
the Dog belonging to some Java collection by birthdate.
compareTo(Dog) - Method in class agilitycompetition.Dog
compareTo (abstract method of the Comparable Interface) is implemented to impose a natural ordering on a group of objects.
compareTo(ElapsedTime) - Method in class agilitycompetition.ElapsedTime
compareTo (abstract method of the comparable Interface) is implemented to impose a natural ordering on a group of objects.
compareTo(Dog) - Method in class agilitycompetition.Pet
compareTo (abstract method of the Comparable Interface) is implemented to impose a natural ordering on a group of objects.
Competitor - Class in agilitycompetition
Course: CSCI 160
Project: AgilityCompetition (Version 2 Solution)
File: Contest.java
Uses: Date, ElapsedTime
Extends: Pet
Overrides: Comparable <Dog>
A class to model a competitor with an elapsed time on the course.
Competitor(Date, String, double, String, String, ElapsedTime) - Constructor for class agilitycompetition.Competitor
Parameterized Constructor for Competitor
